title: Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple
tagline: Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Siddheshwar, and Ratneshwar Temple is situated about 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) from Latur City of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Siddheshwar, and Ratneshwar Temple is situated about 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) from Latur City of Maharashtra, India. The temple was built by King Tamradwaj. There is a fair every year during Mahashivratri.

topPlaces.name: Mamadapur, Latur
topPlaces.description: Mamadapur is a panchayat village in the Latur taluka of Latur district in the western state of Maharashtra, India. Mamadapur is the only village listed for the gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Babhalgaon
topPlaces.description: Babhalgaon is a village in Latur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Sakol
topPlaces.description: Sakol is a panchayat village in Shirur Anantpal Taluka in Latur subdivision of Latur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The village of Sakol is 12 km by road southeast of the village of Shirur Anantpal and 40 km by road northeast of the town of Nilanga.

items.note: Mamadapur is a panchayat village in the Latur taluka of Latur district in the western state of Maharashtra, India. Mamadapur is the only village listed for the gram panchayat.
Babhalgaon is a village in Latur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

Sakol is a panchayat village in Shirur Anantpal Taluka in Latur subdivision of Latur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The village of Sakol is 12 km by road southeast of the village of Shirur Anantpal and 40 km by road northeast of the town of Nilanga.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (117 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (115 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Siddheshwar & Ratneshwar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mamadapur, Latur, Babhalgaon, Sakol.
